channel.title: Edge on Greg Herlein
channel.description: Recent content in Edge on Greg Herlein

item.title: Developing a BrightSign Extension
item.description: Most people think of a BrightSign player as the little box behind a screen that loops a video. That’s true right up until you realize the thing is a full ARM64 Linux computer with an NPU sitting idle most of the day. And you can run your own code on it. Natively. That’s what an extension is, and once you grok it, a whole world opens up.

item.title: The Room Is a Robot (and the NEXXT Sprint to Prove It!)
item.description: Next week I get to watch one of my favorite things: see a room full of smart people handed a hard problem and watch them figure it out in real time. I’m headed to InfoComm to mentor, judge, and sit on a panel for an idea sprint about AI at the edge. And I could not be more excited.

item.title: Book Review: AI at the Edge
item.description: I bought the eBook AI at the Edge. But you can download a free copy from LinkedIn. In short? Don’t waste your money. But for free?
